assertions.assertion: Program.cs removes or replaces at least one static AddOpenIdConnect registration with dynamic provider configuration
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md explains the problem of static AddOpenIdConnect causing DI overhead and shows the dynamic provider solution.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs or a seed file creates an OidcProvider with Scheme set to 'demoidsrv' and Authority set to 'https://demo.duendesoftware.com'
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows exact seed example with `Scheme = "demoidsrv"`, `Authority = "https://demo.duendesoftware.com"`, `ClientId = "login"`.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddConfigurationStoreCache() for caching dynamic provider lookups
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md explicitly states 'EF stores: Use AddConfigurationStoreCache()' for caching dynamic providers.

assertions.assertion: Response mentions or acknowledges that dynamic identity providers require the Enterprise Edition
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md explicitly states 'Dynamic identity providers are part of the Duende IdentityServer Enterprise Edition'.
